text.title: Cross Team Points Calibration Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule in `01-core-rules.xml`. Walk top-down; stop at the first matching conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the input satisfy every `Applies If` precondition (typed inputs available, downstream consumer named, tier >= pro)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — surface the missing precondition to the operator and STOP

branch.question: Is a single accountable owner named in the inputs (handle / email / role, not `team` / `we` / `us`)?

conclusion.verdict: block-output — require a named human or named role-with-rotation before drafting

branch.question: Does every required input have a path / URL / artefact id (no free-form prose without citation)?

conclusion.verdict: reject — re-run with explicit input list pinned in context

branch.question: Does a working artefact already exist for this gap in the artefact store?

conclusion.verdict: update-existing — bump version + last_reviewed; do not duplicate
run-the-methodology — draft new artefact, citing every input in rationale

text.example: applies_if_all_met=true → owner_named=true (ruslan@faion.net) → inputs_cited=true (3 inputs with paths) → existing_artefact=true (baseline-2026-05-15) → update-existing per `r4-versioned`.
